svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="BPMN - 3.3.5 Care Queue Workflow" id="bpmn-335-carequeue"> <mxGraphModel dx="-1049" dy="-393" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2150" pageHeight="1450" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pool_gymowner" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=20;horizontal=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="GymOwner / Nhân viên" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="2050" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_start" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=standard;symbol=general;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Bắt đầu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_open" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Vào
/gym-owner/care-queue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="150" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_viewlist" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Xem danh sách ưu tiên cao
trước (HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="400" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_selectrec" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Chọn 1 recommendation
cần xử lý" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="670" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_readinfo" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Đọc thông tin: tên member,
lý do, gợi ý hành động" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="910" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_action" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Gửi tin nhắn/email
nhắc nhở qua hệ thống" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="200" x="1170" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_confirmbtn" parent="pool_gymowner" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Bấm

kết quả (renewed/declined/
unreachable/other), ghi chú" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="1420" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_gwunreach" parent="pool_gymowner" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Kết quả =

hẹn tạo lại yêu cầu

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 260px; margin-left: -249px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 87px; margin-left: 75px;
